name: Orange Poppy Seed Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9 x 5 inch loaf pan. Mix together the flour, poppy seeds, and salt in a bowl; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream the butter and eggs until light and fluffy. Add the sugar one at a time, beating well after each addition. Fold in the flour mixture alternately with the remaining ingredients (one third at a time) until fully incorporated. Pour into the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 60 minutes or until lightly browned. If necessary, cover the last 10 minutes of baking to prevent over-browning.
5. Allow the cake to cool on a rack for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan and brushing with the glaze. Let stand at room temperature for 1-2 days for optimal flavor.
